text: Living a healthy life is about more than just eating vegetables. A balanced diet, with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, like walking or cycling for thirty minutes a day, strengthens your heart and bones. However, many people forget the importance of sleep. Getting seven to nine hours of quality rest each night is essential for your body to recover. Equally important is your mental health. Taking time to relax, talk to friends, or practice mindfulness can reduce stress. Finally, try to maintain a work-life balance. Setting boundaries between your job and personal time helps prevent burnout and keeps you happier overall.
